name: aiep-git
description: Read-scoped git access that exposes repository history and the change delta for a Work Order. Supports the git-delta-review skill by giving reviewers the diff and minimal surrounding context instead of the whole tree.

resources.name: change-delta
resources.description: The diff for a Work Order between its base and head, used as the primary review context.

resources.name: commit-history
resources.description: Read-only commit metadata and messages for a ref.

tools.name: get_diff
tools.description: Return the diff between two refs (default: branch vs. merge base).

tools.name: get_changed_files
tools.description: List files changed for a Work Order's branch relative to its base.

tools.name: get_blame_context
tools.description: Return minimal surrounding context (enclosing function/region) for a changed hunk.

accessPolicy.notes: No write, commit, push, or history-rewrite capabilities are exposed.

notes: REFERENCE DESCRIPTOR ONLY. Illustrative shape for integrating an MCP git server with AIEP reviewers. Not a shipped v1.0 runtime component. Read-only by design so reviewers can scope to the delta without mutating the repository.
